task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Electrical Engineering Calculations app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the resistance value of 47 kΩ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 47 (with kΩ unit) or 47000 (with Ω unit or as a raw number) is entered into an input field within the app.

task_completion.description: Enter the capacitance value of 100 μF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 100 (with μF unit) or 0.0001 (with F unit or as a raw number) is entered into an input field within the app.
A calculate button is pressed, an equals sign is used, or the app is actively processing the entered values.

task_completion.description: Ensure the calculated time constant result is displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calculated result of 4.7 (acceptable range: 4.653 to 4.747) is displayed on the screen as the output of the calculation within the app.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, not a generic calculator or web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The calculation and result are shown within the Electrical Engineering Calculations app interface.

integrity.description: The agent must not type the expected answer into a text editor or notes app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The result is displayed as a genuine calculation output, not as typed text in a text editor, notes app, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent must not use a terminal or script to perform the calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal emulator or command-line interface is used to calculate or print the result.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected time constant for an RC circuit with R = 47 kΩ and C = 100 μF is 4.7 seconds (acceptable range: 4.653s to 4.747s). Note: The Electrical Calculations app does NOT actually contain a dedicated RC Time Constant calculator. The agent must still attempt to use this specific app as requested. If the agent uses a different app (like a standard calculator), it should fail the task completion items that require the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, as well as the integrity check.
